sql_array: CREATE TABLE nntp_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, server_name VARCHAR(255), authorized_user VARCHAR(255), creation_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO nntp_test VALUES (1, 'nntp.example.com', 'user1', NULL), (2, NULL, 'user2', '2023-01-01 10:00:00');
SELECT server_name, nntp_auth_get(authorized_user) AS auth_info FROM nntp_test WHERE server_name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT bif:exec('SELECT server_name FROM nntp_test WHERE authorized_user = ''user1'';') AS result;
SELECT bif:exec('INSERT INTO nntp_test (server_name, authorized_user) VALUES (''nntp.test.com'', NULL);');
SELECT id, server_name, bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nntp_test WHERE authorized_user IS NOT NULL') AS auth_count FROM nntp_test GROUP BY server_name HAVING auth_count > 0;
SELECT DISTINCT server_name FROM nntp_test WHERE creation_date = (SELECT MAX(creation_date) FROM nntp_test) AND bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nntp_test WHERE authorized_user IS NOT NULL') > 0;
SELECT server_name FROM nntp_test WHERE NULLIF(authorized_user, '') IS NULL AND bif:exec('SELECT AVG(id) FROM nntp_test');
SELECT server_name, bif:exec('SELECT nntp_auth_get(authorized_user) FROM nntp_test WHERE id = 1') AS auth_info FROM nntp_test WHERE server_name IS NOT NULL AND authorized_user IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_auth_test (temp_id INT, temp_name VARCHAR(200), temp_auth VARBINARY(255));
INSERT INTO temp_auth_test SELECT id, server_name, CAST(nntp_auth_get(authorized_user) AS VARBINARY(255)) FROM nntp_test WHERE authorized_user IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp_name, bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_auth_test WHERE temp_auth IS NOT NULL') AS temp_count FROM temp_auth_test GROUP BY temp_name HAVING temp_count > 0;
